description_for_human: Detect weasel words, passive voice, duplicate words, long sentences, nominalizations, hedging, and filler adverbs in your writing.
description_for_model: A writing analysis tool that detects 7 types of writing issues: weasel words, passive voice, duplicate words, long sentences, nominalizations, hedging language, and filler adverbs. Send text via POST /api/check to receive structured results with issue positions and context. Supports custom configuration via a config object to enable/disable detectors and customize word lists. Also available as an MCP server at /mcp.
